review: The Cappuccino is amazing here, and the coffee always tastes fresh, never bitter or stale.
The Classic Burger here is honestly one of the best I've had in the neighborhood. Will be back!
The Latte was decent, nothing special. Service was okay, not particularly fast or slow.
The Pancakes was fresh and the presentation was lovely. Nice spot for brunch.
Long wait during lunch rush, and the Pepperoni Pizza came out with barely any toppings.
Delivery driver took ages and the Cappuccino I ordered had gone lukewarm in the packaging.
Cozy seating, great music, and the Cheesecake was delicious. Perfect weekend spot.
Delivery took way too long and the Margherita Pizza box was soggy on arrival.
Lovely evening spent here with Classic Burger and dessert. The place has such a nice ambience.
I'm a regular for their Cold Coffee. Consistent quality every single time.
It's a fine café for the area - nothing that stood out as bad or great.
We waited so long for the Grilled Sandwich that the kids' Cheesecake melted before the mains even arrived.
The Pancakes were fine, standard breakfast fare. Wouldn't go out of my way for it.
Ordered a Veggie Burger and the patty was clearly not fully thawed, quite disappointing.
One of the staff members was quite rude when I asked about the delay on our order.
Excellent pizzas, and the Pepperoni Pizza we ordered alongside was just as good.
Got someone else's Alfredo Pasta order instead of my Grilled Sandwich. Had to send it back.
The Pepperoni Pizza was fresh and the presentation was lovely. Nice spot for brunch.
Ordered the Cheesecake and it did not disappoint - fresh, hot, and full of flavor.
The Cold Coffee was good, but seating was cramped when we visited on a Saturday.
I'm a regular for their Margherita Pizza. Consistent quality every single time.
The croissants were unavailable again this morning. Third time I've come in for breakfast and been let down.
Their Margherita Pizza is a must-try. Perfectly balanced flavors every time.
Our Pancakes came out wrong twice - had to send it back and wait another 20 minutes.
Came in for Margherita Pizza and ended up loving the whole vibe of the place. Great ambience.
Cold Coffee took forever to arrive even though the café wasn't that busy.
Staff were so friendly and the Pepperoni Pizza was cooked to perfection.
The staff remembered my usual order of Latte - such a friendly touch.
Wrong order again - asked for Classic Burger, got Veggie Burger instead, and no one apologized.
The Cold Coffee is amazing here, and the coffee always tastes fresh, never bitter or stale.
Ordered delivery and it took over an hour to arrive. The Margherita Pizza was barely warm by the time it got here.
Margherita Pizza was fine but I've had better elsewhere. Ambience is nice though.
Lovely evening spent here with Grilled Sandwich and dessert. The place has such a nice ambience.
The Cappuccino arrived quickly and was still warm - great service today.
Fresh Juice was fine, though I expected it to be a bit less watered down.
Great value meal - Fresh Juice plus a coffee for a very reasonable price.
The Grilled Sandwich arrived quickly and was still warm - great service today.
Coffee was fresh but the Chocolate Brownie was a little too sweet for my taste.
Delivery was really slow tonight - almost 50 minutes for a Pepperoni Pizza that's a 10 minute drive away.
The Fresh Juice tasted off today, and the wait at the counter was longer than usual.
Lovely evening spent here with Grilled Sandwich and dessert. The place has such a nice ambience.
Cozy seating, great music, and the Pepperoni Pizza was delicious. Perfect weekend spot.
Staff were so friendly and the Pancakes was cooked to perfection.
I'm a regular for their Cheesecake. Consistent quality every single time.
Best Margherita Pizza in the area, hands down. Good value for the price too.
The Cheesecake is amazing here, and the coffee always tastes fresh, never bitter or stale.
Decent place to work from with a coffee, though it does get noisy during lunch hours.
The Cappuccino here is honestly one of the best I've had in the neighborhood. Will be back!
Wanted the Cheesecake but was told they were out of it again. This is the second time this month.
Pepperoni Pizza was average, toppings felt a little sparse this time.
It's an okay spot for a quick bite. The Alfredo Pasta portion could be bigger for the price.
The staff remembered my usual order of Alfredo Pasta - such a friendly touch.
Best Chocolate Brownie in the area, hands down. Good value for the price too.
Service was a little slow during the evening rush, but the Espresso was solid.
Ordered the Latte and it did not disappoint - fresh, hot, and full of flavor.
Came in for Latte and ended up loving the whole vibe of the place. Great ambience.
Asked for a Chocolate Brownie and they said they'd run out of chocolate stock for the day. Disappointing.
Ordered the Alfredo Pasta and it did not disappoint - fresh, hot, and full of flavor.
Best Pancakes in the area, hands down. Good value for the price too.
Excellent pizzas, and the Chocolate Brownie we ordered alongside was just as good.
Came in for Cold Coffee and ended up loving the whole vibe of the place. Great ambience.
Their Latte is a must-try. Perfectly balanced flavors every time.
Waited nearly 40 minutes for our order to even reach the table during dinner. Way too long.
Nothing wrong with the Cappuccino, just felt a bit overpriced compared to nearby cafés.
The Fresh Juice arrived quickly and was still warm - great service today.
Mixed feelings - great coffee but the Veggie Burger patty tasted a bit frozen still.
Staff were so friendly and the Classic Burger was cooked to perfection.
Average experience overall. The Classic Burger was good, but the Grilled Sandwich felt a bit dry.
The staff remembered my usual order of Fresh Juice - such a friendly touch.
The Cheesecake was good but they'd run out of the flavor I wanted, had to settle for plain.
The Classic Burger arrived cold, like it had been sitting around before delivery.
The Espresso was fine but the delivery packaging had leaked all over the bag.
The Cappuccino here is honestly one of the best I've had in the neighborhood. Will be back!
Excellent pizzas, and the Espresso we ordered alongside was just as good.
Great value meal - Espresso plus a coffee for a very reasonable price.
